2.reason: 数组大小应为11，因为需要索引1到10，当前大小导致越界访问

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  数组大小应为11，因为需要索引1到10，当前大小导致越界访问
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  index out of bounds when N=10, need size 11
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Array size is insufficient for N=10. Accessing mark[10] when i=10 causes an out-of-bounds error. Should be mark[11].
